Space & Defense.title: Astroscale France and Exotrail sign contract for satellite deorbiting mission
Space & Defense.summary: Astroscale France and French space company Exotrail have signed a contract to develop a satellite deorbiting mission, in a move the companies say is intended to strengthen France-Japan cooperation on space sustainability. Space & Defense.title: NASA’s Artemis II mission leaves Earth orbit for lunar flyby
Space & Defense.summary: NASA says its Artemis II mission has departed Earth orbit and is now on a trajectory to fly around the Moon, following a key burn of the Orion spacecraft’s main engine. Space & Defense.title: Bright Ascension software successfully supports launch of AAC Clyde Space VIREON™ satellites
Space & Defense.summary: Bright Ascension confirms the successful launch of two VIREON™ Earth observation satellites, developed by AAC Clyde Space. Space & Defense.title: NASA launches Artemis II crew on 10-day Moon flyby test mission
Space & Defense.summary: NASA has launched the crewed Artemis II mission, sending four astronauts aboard the Orion spacecraft on a planned test flight around the Moon and back. Space & Defense.summary: Teledyne Technologies has announced it is integrating its space-focused technologies and businesses under a new collective, Teledyne Space, as the company prepares to present the combined portfolio at the 2026 Space Symposium in Colorado Springs. Space & Defense.summary: Southern Launch says it has been selected to support tracking of NASA’s Artemis II Orion mission from South Australia, using passive Doppler tracking infrastructure at the Koonibba Test Range.
